programme.desc: This is Film - Thriller Category.

programme.title: Bad Boys: Ride or Die
programme.desc: Mike and Marcus face their toughest case yet as their late captain's reputation hangs in the balance. Subsequently, they unravel a complex web of cartel connections in a high-stakes mission.

programme.title: The Water Horse
programme.desc: Young Angus Mac Morrow discovers a mysterious egg that grows up to be the Loch Ness monster. As they form a strong relationship, the boy's family refuses to believe in the creature's existence.

programme.title: Battle: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Michael Nantz, a Marine staff sergeant, renders his services again, soon after his retirement. He and his platoon have to save the city of Los Angeles from alien invaders.

programme.title: Ghostbusters: Afterlife
programme.desc: A single mother and her two children move into a farmhouse inherited from her estranged father. As they settle in, they discover their associations with Ghostbusters.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: Count Dracula runs a high-end resort for monsters and is overprotective of his daughter, Mavis. When Johnny, a human, enters the hotel, Count Dracula tries to prevent Mavis from falling for him.

programme.title: A Few Good Men
programme.desc: A lawyer from the US military safeguards two US marines who are charged for killing a fellow marine and a colonel turns into the prime suspect.

programme.title: Uncharted
programme.desc: Recruited by Victor, street-smart Nathan steps into a race for the lost treasure of Ferdinand Magellan. However, a corrupt billionaire and an evil mercenary also have the same goal.

programme.title: Fight For Love
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Falsely accused noblewoman Chu Yu (Victoria Song) teams up with Wei Yun (Ding Yuxi) to uncover a military massacre’s truth; amid war and palace intrigue, they fall in love while defending their homeland.

programme.title: Lo And Behold
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 801-850) VVD Mandarin
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Heroes In White
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Sai-hang takes an unconscious Wing-sum to a hotel room as he wants to molest her. Yee-ting shows false concern for Wing-sum, who suspects Yee-ting has drugged her. Wing-sum is wary of Yee-ting. Sis Fung and Lik-to find out Shuk-foon has gone to the lawyer office, so they put pressure on Pui-ha.

programme.title: Legend of the Magnate
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Gu Ping Yuan (Chen Xiao), framed and exiled after failing the imperial exam, escapes with a salt caravan and rises as a daring merchant. He uncovers hidden plots, and discovers that the conspiracy that ruined him was actually aimed at the Li family.

programme.title: Lo And Behold
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Hilarious Family
programme.desc: This heartwarming drama tells the story of Du Ruyu (Liu Lin), a single mother who has been widowed for 18 years, raising her four daughters, each with very different personalities, on her own. The family is filled with both laughter and tears.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 801-850) VVD Mandarin
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Good Job

programme.title: Fight For Love

programme.title: Big Biz Duel
programme.desc: While delivering goods, Fong Wang clashes with some bumpkin car owner. Ting Ning wants to sensationalize this incident. To-ming is ridiculed. Sung Kiu sends a video link for viewing how the conundrum is resolved.

programme.title: Petaka Akibat Sumpah Ibu
programme.desc: Bu Imah, struggling in the strong river current, shouts at Dani that his life will never be peaceful because he has harmed his own child and mother. Dani ignores her and leaves with satisfaction. However, fate has other plans. On his way home, a lightning-struck tree falls on him, leaving him unconscious and in a coma.

programme.title: Maunya Jadian Sama Kamu Tapi Takut Dosa
programme.desc: Rosi (Rayna Snova) mantan dari Vino (Jeff Smith) mereka putus karena ibu Rosi menerima uang dari mama Vino. Saat ini Vino bekerja sebagai hantu di rumah hantu pasar malam. Rosi yang tak mengenali Vino pun curhat karena diselingkuhi oleh mantannya.

programme.desc: Tasya (Soraya Rasyid), seorang gadis cantik yang hobi balap motor. Pada suatu hari, Tasya dan gengnya sedang melakukan aksi balap motor liar di jalanan. Mereka nekat ngebut-ngebutan tanpa memikirkan keselamatan orang lain.Akibat geng motor tersebut, hampir saja murid Rendy (Bara Valentino) tertabrak. Sebagai guru SD, Rendy murka dan nyaris terlibat adu hantam dengan teman Tasya.

programme.desc: Radit (Fendy Chow) runs away from home and is chased by his brother. Radit accidentally entered Rhea's (Yuriska Patricia) room to hide. Rhea, who was holding an engagement at her house, suddenly entered the room and shouted to see Radit.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: RAYUAN PEDAS NONA CABE
programme.desc: Since his mother died, Marvin has been living with Agus, his father, and his new brother, Ramon. Since childhood, Marvin has hated Ramon because he always received gifts from Agus while Marvin received punishments, and he never considered Ramon his brother. Eleven years later, Ramon was doing community service at a chili plantation, and one of the farmers was Desi.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Cewek Cromboloni Menyala Adindakuh
programme.desc: One day when Dania (Nabila Zavira) was riding her motorcycle, she saw her boyfriend Rangga (Joshua Otay) with another woman. Dania was shocked because she did not expect her boyfriend to have an affair with another woman behind her back. After that, Dania brooded alone in a park. She said she wished someone would give her a hug when she was vulnerable like that.
